title: Radha Krishna themed redesign with product images, Instagram contact, and Short Kurti category

requirements.text: Redesign the entire website with a Radha Krishna devotional theme — use a divine color palette of deep peacock blue, gold, saffron, and lotus pink; incorporate decorative motifs such as peacock feathers, flute silhouettes, lotus flowers, and mandala borders throughout the UI (header, section dividers, hero background, cards). Apply this theme consistently across all components including Header, HeroSection, FeaturedProducts, AboutSection, and Footer.

quotes: ek radha krishna interface bali website create kr do

acceptanceCriteria: The color palette uses deep peacock blue, gold, saffron, and lotus pink as primary tones
Decorative motifs (peacock feathers, flute, lotus, mandala) appear as dividers or accent elements throughout the page
The hero section uses the generated Radha Krishna banner image as its background
All sections (Header, HeroSection, FeaturedProducts, AboutSection, Footer) reflect the updated theme consistently

requirements.text: Update the Footer component to replace any existing WhatsApp or placeholder contact link with the Instagram link https://www.instagram.com/divyavastra_?igsh=eGd4eTc2bGl4MzN1, displaying it prominently as the primary contact/social channel with the Instagram icon and the handle @divyavastra_.

quotes: contact ke liye https://www.instagram.com/divyavastra_?igsh=eGd4eTc2bGl4MzN1 yeh ig ka link h

acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays an Instagram icon linking to https://www.instagram.com/divyavastra_?igsh=eGd4eTc2bGl4MzN1
The Instagram handle @divyavastra_ is visible as the label
The link opens in a new tab

requirements.text: Add a 'Short Kurtis' product category to the backend data model and seed at least 3 sample Short Kurti products alongside the existing Gopi Skirt products. Each product must include id, name, description, price, category ('Short Kurti'), imageUrl, and availability fields.

quotes: short kurti ka bhi pyara sa cute sa interface tyaar kr do

acceptanceCriteria: Backend seeds at least 3 Short Kurti products with all required fields populated
getProducts returns products of both 'Gopi Skirt' and 'Short Kurti' categories
Each Short Kurti product has a non-empty imageUrl field

requirements.text: Add a dedicated 'Short Kurtis' section on the homepage alongside the existing Gopi Skirts collection. Display Short Kurti products in a cute, pretty layout with pastel floral accents distinct from the Gopi Skirts grid. Use category filtering to separate and display the two product categories in their own labeled sections.

quotes: short kurti ka bhi pyara sa cute sa interface tyaar kr do

acceptanceCriteria: Homepage has two distinct labeled collection sections: 'Gopi Skirts' and 'Short Kurtis'
Each section only shows products of its respective category
The Short Kurtis section uses a visually distinct but complementary cute/floral styling
Both sections are responsive and display product cards with name, price, description, and image

requirements.text: Use the uploaded product photos as product images in the catalog. Map the uploaded images to backend product records: use IMG_4047-1.jpeg and IMG_4047-2.jpeg for a Gopi Skirt product (red/gold floral lehenga), IMG_4044-1.jpeg and IMG_4044-2.jpeg for a Gopi Skirt product (navy/gold lehenga), IMG_4045-1.jpeg and IMG_4045-2.jpeg for a Gopi Skirt product (pink floral lehenga), and IMG_4048-1.jpeg and IMG_4048-2.jpeg for a Short Kurti product (white/purple block-print kurti). Serve these as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated and update the backend seed imageUrl values accordingly.
acceptanceCriteria: Product images from the uploaded photos are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated
Backend seed data references the correct static asset paths for each product
ProductCard components render the actual product photos

constraints: Instagram link must be used exactly as provided: https://www.instagram.com/divyavastra_?igsh=eGd4eTc2bGl4MzN1
Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
All product images must be served as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated, not via the backend
nonGoals: No e-commerce checkout or payment integration
No user authentication or login functionality
No WhatsApp or Facebook contact integration
No new pages beyond the single-page homepage layout

required: Wide decorative hero banner with Radha Krishna devotional illustration — peacock blue sky, golden temple pillars, lotus flowers, peacock feathers, flute motifs, and warm glowing diyas, rich saffron and gold color palette (radha-krishna-hero-banner.dim_1440x700.png)
Decorative horizontal divider strip with peacock feather and lotus mandala pattern in gold and teal on a deep navy background (section-divider-motif.dim_1440x80.png)
Circular brand logo emblem with flute and lotus motif in gold on deep blue background with ornate border (divyavastra-logo-emblem.dim_200x200.png)
